s1-002: Hanging cheek with cheek piece attached to the mouthpiece and a loose ring
s2-019: Pinchless Snaffle (central joint must have rounded edges)
s2-022: Mouthpiece with holes(Bits must have a smooth surface.)
s2-026: Weymouth (largest and smallest ports illustrated). (Refer to measuring bits section below)
s2-028: Curb bits with a ported/tilted mouthpiece.
s2-037: Bit Tape to cover the mouthpiece (latex or rubber)
s2-038: Bit Tape to create a bit guard
s3-005: PS Of Sweden Noseband, (with Throat Lash)
s3-009: Bridles with DRings at the Poll
s3-011: Noseband with metal sliding system attached to cheek piece
s3-024: Blinkers of any type, including wool padding on cheek piece
s3-029: Reins with hand stoppers or knotted
s4-001: Jackets: Any solid colour is permitted. Wide contrast stripes and multi-coloured jackets and coats are not permitted. (Examples shown)
s4-007: Embossing /decoration at the top of the Top Boot only is permitted but must be in the same colour scheme as the boot. The same applies to the cantle of the saddle.
s4-008: Boots can be of smooth or smooth embossed surface. A neat and discrete zip on the outside area of the boot/chap is permitted.
s4-009: Coloured piping is permitted if it matches the piping on the Riding Jacket & or saddle
s5-009: Other examples of Safety Stirrups permitted
s6-001: Ear bonnet/hoods but, must not be attached to the noseband(no additional insulation & no ear plugs allowed)
s6-002: Tight fitting Head cover or Titanium hoods are not permitted when horses are ridden. They are permitted in the stables/yards & when tied to horse floats.
s6-006: Electronic devices / headsets; 1 ear piece only
s6-010: Running Martingales are allowed in warm up only on a snaffle bridle but rein stoppers must be used
s7-001: Boots or Bandages that cover the hoof
s7-004: Nailed or Glued shoes must be clear if covers more of the hoof wall than that of a nailed shoe. Bulbs of the heel & full circumference of coronary band must be visible
s8-001: Spurs with a Disc Rowel in the Vertical or Horizontal Plane (must be smooth and blunt)
s8-002: Rowel Spurs with serrated tines, blunt or otherwise, are not permitted
s8-004: Smart Clix Spurs with no serrated tines
s8-004b: Smart Clix Spurs with serrated tines
s8-006: Coloured Spurs (unless they match the riders boots)
s8-011: Spursuader Spurs/ Spurs with flat disc
